Meta.Name: Meta Template System
Meta.Description: Owns canonical scaffolds, discovery metadata rules, relational contract stubs, and starter templates for V4 skill construction.

Input.Name: target_role
Input.Description: Role or family that needs a template.

Input.Name: target_domain
Input.Description: Family-specific domain for routing and terminology.

Input.Name: discovery_requirements
Input.Description: Expected naming, trigger, and manifest behavior.

Output.Name: template_bundle
Output.Description: Canonical scaffold plus discovery metadata and relational contract stubs.

Rules.Rule: Discovery fields must be explicit enough for routing and manifest generation.
Every scaffold must include relational contract placeholders.
Templates follow SkillML V1.4 and the atomic v2 pipeline vocabulary.

Step.Name: Choose Scaffold
Step.Action: Select the narrowest viable template for the requested role.

Step.Name: Inject Discovery Rules
Step.Action: Add canonical ID, trigger language, outputs, and wake-condition scaffolding.

Step.Name: Inject Relational Stubs
Step.Action: Add upstream, downstream, review, and patch ownership placeholders.

Implementation.TemplateStub: CANONICAL V4 STUB - skill_id: {domain}_{function} - Meta, Contract, ExecutionProtocol, SelfCheck, PatchLog required - layer tags required: CONTRACT, RULES, REASONING, IMPL - discovery fields required: role description, triggers, outputs, sister links - relational fields required: upstream, downstream, wake, review, patch

SelfCheck.Check: Every template includes all required V1.4 sections.
Every template includes discovery and relational placeholders.
No template uses stale legacy naming as the default.

MMAGate.Trigger: Before a template is released as canonical.
MMAGate.Threshold: Scaffold supports manifest routing, relational linkage, and builder handoff.

Mode.Recovery: Reissue the scaffold from the canonical stub.
Expand trigger and output fields until routing intent is clear.
Patch the template to canonical V4 vocabulary.

PatchLog.Entry: Created canonical template owner for V4 skill family migrations.
